title: Scale ingestion to a full pilot state/region + snapshot refresh
context: M2 expands coverage from the single-region pilot to a full state or region — enough to demonstrate meaningful geographic coverage for a partner adoption. State primacy-agency data must have its license verified per state before ingestion; many states publish open data but this is not assumed. Data gaps (systems with no recent monitoring, known SDWIS gaps) must be surfaced honestly in a coverage report, never silently corrected or filled with assumptions.
objective: Extend ingestion to a full pilot state or region: (1) verify and register the license for any state primacy-agency data before ingestion; (2) ingest all available EPA SDWIS/ECHO and applicable state data for the region into refreshed, checksummed snapshots; (3) commit a coverage report that identifies which water systems have data, which have gaps, and which have monitoring lags; (4) surface upstream data gaps honestly — never silently correct or infer values for missing data.
acceptanceCriteria: License verified and registered in the source registry for any state primacy-agency data used
Full pilot state or region ingested into refreshed, checksummed snapshots passing the CI reconciliation gate
Coverage report committed to the repo identifying systems with data, systems with gaps, and monitoring-lag details
Upstream data gaps surfaced honestly in the coverage report; no silent correction or inference of missing values
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
output: PR adding expanded ingestion for the full pilot state/region with checksummed snapshots, coverage report, and CI reconciliation.
